metadata.summary: Automated Numerical To Analytical REconstruction Software

functions.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.composed
documentation:
Apply an arbitrary number of decorators in a single line.

The following are equivalent:

# Examples

Using `composed`:

```pycon
>>> @composed(decorator1, decorator2)
... def func(...):
...     pass
```

Using individual decorators:

```pycon
>>> @decorator1
... @decorator2
... def func(...):
...     pass
```

# Parameters

decorators

: An arbitrary number of decorator functions to be applied.

# Returns

callable

: A function decorated with all the provided decorators.

functions.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.as_scalar_if_scalar
documentation: Turns numpy arrays with zero dimensions into 'real' scalars.

functions.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.numpy_vectorized
documentation: Similar to numpy.vectorize when used as a decorator, but retains the __name__ of the decorated function and accepts args and kwargs.

methods.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.Numerical_Methods.mass_dimension
documentation: Returns the mass (a.k.a. energy) dimension. The value is expected to be a (half-)integer. Return type is float, vectorized depending on input.

methods.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.Numerical_Methods.phase_weights
documentation: Returns the phase weights (a.k.a. little group scalings). Return type is a list of int's, vectorized depending on input.

methods.name: antares.core.numerical_methods.Numerical_Methods.all_symmetries
documentation: Obtain the symmetries of the function, by numerical evaluation.

classes.name: antares.core.numerical_methods._tensor_function

methods.name: antares.core.numerical_methods._tensor_function.__init__
documentation: Taken from linac, import from there once made public

Tensor function supporting indexing and iteration.
For instance, the initializer 'callable_function' can be a function returning a numpy.array

methods.name: antares.terms.terms_numerator_fit.Terms_numerators_fit.fit_numerators
documentation: Obtains numerators by fitting the coefficients of an ansatz. Updates self if succesful. Makes self an empty list otherwise.

methods.name: antares.core.bh_unknown.BHUnknown.helconf
documentation: Helicity configuration. Accepts string or list with following words: (qp|qm|qbp|qbm|gp|gm|p|m). Returns a list.

methods.name: antares.core.bh_unknown.BHUnknown.loopid
documentation: Id of the particle in the loop. An helicity configuration needs to be set beforehand.

functions.name: antares.core.tools.log_linear_fit
documentation: Fit slope of straight line in a log-log scatter plot. Slope has to be integer or half integer.

functions.name: antares.core.tools.chained_gcd
documentation: GCD of array, exluding outliers from both ends of the sorted array.

functions.name: antares.core.tools.forbidden_ordering
documentation: order first list wrt number of forbidden pairs with second one

functions.name: antares.core.tools.chunks
documentation: Yield successive n-sized chunks from l.

classes.name: antares.core.tools.OutputGrabber

methods.name: antares.core.tools.OutputGrabber.stop
documentation: Stop capturing the stream data and save the text in `capturedtext`.

methods.name: antares.core.tools.OutputGrabber.readOutput
documentation:
Read the stream data (one byte at a time)
and save the text in `capturedtext`.
Class used to grab standard output or another stream.

methods.name: antares.terms.term.Term.simplify_factored_monomials
documentation:
Cancels powers of manifestly common factors between numerator and denominator.
Lighter than rerunning single scaling study, but less powerful, since single scalings
can also handle cancellations involving non-trivial rewritings (e.g. shoutens).

functions.name: antares.terms.terms.parse_pNBs_to_functions
documentation: Converts a pNB to a function with the zab12 notation.

methods.name: antares.terms.terms.Terms._parse_term
documentation: Returns a functional equivalent represerentation of the imputted string.
